blocks.body: Past Perfect — had + V3 for an action that happened before another past action or before a past moment.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"Past Perfect shows that one action happened earlier than another past action or was already complete by a past moment.","rules":[{"label":"Forms","color":"emerald","text":"Start with the model had + V3 for all subjects.","example":"I had finished. / She had left."},{"label":"Earlier past action","color":"blue","text":"This tense helps you show the order of two past events.","example":"She had left before I arrived."},{"label":"Before a past moment","color":"amber","text":"Use Past Perfect when the result or action was already complete by a past time.","example":"By 6 p.m., we had finished the report."},{"label":"Time expressions","color":"violet","text":"Words like before, after, by the time, already, just, never, before that, until then often point to this tense.","example":"They had already eaten before the guests came."}]}

{"title":"1. Lessons in order","intro":"Start with the form, then move to negatives, questions, and time expressions. Each card includes short rules from the matching lesson.","items":[{"label":"A2–B1","title":"Forms and Use","subtitle":"had + V3 and the main meanings of Past Perfect.","rules":[{"label":"Form","formula":"had + V3","text":"The form is the same for every subject: had + V3.","example":"I had finished. / She had left."},{"label":"Use","formula":"before another past","text":"Use it for an action that happened before another past action.","example":"When I arrived, they had left."}]},{"label":"A2–B1","title":"Negatives","subtitle":"had not / hadn't + V3 for actions that had not happened before another past point.","rules":[{"label":"Negative","formula":"hadn't + V3","text":"Use hadn't + V3 for the negative.","example":"We hadn't finished before dinner."},{"label":"Yet / never","formula":"not yet / never","text":"Yet / never show that something had not happened before a past moment.","example":"She had never seen snow before."}]},{"label":"A2–B1","title":"Questions and Short Answers","subtitle":"Had you...?, Had she...? and short answers.","rules":[{"label":"Question","formula":"Had + subject + V3?","text":"Put Had at the beginning for every subject.","example":"Had you finished before he came?"},{"label":"Short answers","formula":"had / hadn't","text":"Repeat had or hadn't in short answers.","example":"Yes, I had. / No, she hadn't."}]},{"label":"A2–B1","title":"Time Expressions","subtitle":"before, after, by the time, already, just, never, before that, until then.","rules":[{"label":"Result now","formula":"before / by the time","text":"These markers show that one past action happened before another.","example":"They had left before we arrived."},{"label":"Open period","formula":"already / just / never","text":"These words show what had or had not happened by a past moment.","example":"He had already eaten."}]}]}

{"title":"2. Where you need this tense","sections":[{"label":"Earlier action in the past","color":"emerald","description":"Show that one action happened before another past action.","examples":[{"en":"When I arrived, they had already left.","ua":"They were already gone when I arrived."},{"en":"She had finished dinner before the film started.","ua":"Dinner was complete before the film began."}]},{"label":"Before a past moment","color":"blue","description":"Talk about a result that was already ready by a past time.","examples":[{"en":"By noon, we had answered all the emails.","ua":"The task was already complete by noon."},{"en":"He had saved enough money by the end of summer.","ua":"The result was ready by that point."}]},{"label":"Stories and explanations","color":"amber","description":"Past Perfect often explains a reason or background in a story.","examples":[{"en":"She was tired because she had worked all night.","ua":"The earlier action explains the later situation."},{"en":"They were nervous because they had never flown before.","ua":"No earlier experience explains their feeling."}]},{"label":"Order of two events","color":"violet","description":"The tense makes the order of events clear without a long explanation.","examples":[{"en":"After he had locked the door, he went to bed.","ua":"First he locked the door, then he went to bed."},{"en":"We had met once before we started working together.","ua":"The meeting happened earlier in the past."}]}]}

{"title":"3. In short","items":["Past Perfect = had + V3.","Use this tense when one action happened before another past action or before a past moment.","It often appears in stories, explanations of reasons, and descriptions of a result that was already ready then.","Words like before, after, by the time, already, and just often point to this tense."]}
